evals.prompt: 변경된 웹 코드의 접근성을 KWCAG2.2 기준으로 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: kwcag22.md 참조하여 33개 항목 평가, O/X/△/N/A 분류표 생성, HTML+CSV 리포트 출력

assertions.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated in the report
Semantic HTML review section is included in the report
report.html file is generated in outputs directory
report.csv file is generated in outputs directory
Detected missing alt attribute on img in index.html (line 30)
Detected icon buttons without aria-label in dashboard.tsx
Detected duplicate id='card-item' issue in Card.tsx

evals.prompt: Card.tsx 컴포넌트의 접근성 문제를 KWCAG2.2 기준으로 찾아줘
evals.expected_output: Card.tsx에서 img alt 누락, 키보드 접근성, 색상 대비 등 구체적 이슈 식별

assertions.text: Detected div onClick without keyboard accessibility
Detected duplicate id='card-item' when rendered in a list
Each issue is mapped to a specific KWCAG item number
Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue

evals.prompt: index.html 페이지의 시맨틱 HTML 준수 여부와 접근성을 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: 시맨틱 태그 사용 평가, ARIA 속성 검토, 폼 라벨링 확인

assertions.text: Detected missing alt attribute on logo img
Report includes a dedicated semantic HTML review section
